<!-- Thanks for contributing to pycamtasia! Please fill out this template. -->

## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why -->

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #NNN / Fixes #NNN / Related to #NNN -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore (CI, tests, refactoring without behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (README, docs/, docstrings) if user-facing
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has an entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/camtasia` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes with 100% coverage maintained
- [ ] Commits are focused and have clear messages
